description: groupby dropna=True→False includes NaN as a group key

_meta.explanation: With dropna=False, rows with NaN keys are not dropped — they form their own group (key=NaN). The sum for that group is 30 (the single row where k=None).
_meta.curriculum_note: Level 2: requires understanding that the NaN row has value 30 (not dropped).
_meta.generation_recipe: pandas_mc injection: groupby dropna=True→False includes NaN as a group key
